title: Host triggers Play Again and returns to lobby for a new run
description: Verifies that after a game ends the host can reset the room and the UI returns to the lobby ready to start again.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation mode
Select a preset topic
Generate the quiz questions
Proceed to create a room from the reviewed quiz
Start the game from the host room
For each question, wait for the question to be displayed
For each question, submit any answer option before time expires
Continue after each leaderboard screen until the quiz completes
Choose to play again from the finished state
Verify the host room returns to the lobby state

title: Player waits in lobby and receives a question when the game starts
description: Verifies a player in the lobby sees the first question screen once the host starts the game.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation option
Generate a quiz using a preset topic
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Copy the room code from the host lobby
Navigate to /join
Fill the copied room code into the room code field
Fill PLAYER_GAME_01 into the player name field
Submit the join form
Navigate to /create
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Start the game from the host lobby
Verify the player is shown a question screen with answer options

title: View leaderboard after a timed-out question and continue to next question
description: Verifies that after a player times out on a question the leaderboard is shown and the game continues to the next question.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation mode
Select a preset topic
Generate the quiz questions
Proceed to create a room from the reviewed quiz
Start the game from the host room
Wait for the first question to be displayed
Wait for the question timer to expire without submitting an answer
Verify the leaderboard is displayed with ranks and scores
Continue to the next question
Verify the next question is displayed

title: Submit an answer and see interim leaderboard update
description: Verifies that submitting an answer results in an interim leaderboard view being shown with updated ranking information.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation mode
Select a preset topic
Generate the quiz questions
Proceed to create a room from the reviewed quiz
Start the game from the host room
Wait for the first question to be displayed
Select an answer option
Submit the answer
Verify the leaderboard is displayed with rank and score delta information

title: Player can submit one answer for a question
description: Verifies a player can select an answer and submit once, then is advanced out of the active answering state.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation option
Generate a quiz using a preset topic
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Copy the room code from the host lobby
Navigate to /join
Fill the copied room code into the room code field
Fill PLAYER_GAME_02 into the player name field
Submit the join form
Navigate to /create
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Start the game from the host lobby
Select an answer option
Submit the answer
Verify the player is no longer able to change or submit another answer for the same question

title: Play Again allows starting a new game after reset
description: Verifies that after the host resets a finished room, the host can start the game again and questions are delivered for the new run.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation mode
Select a preset topic
Generate the quiz questions
Proceed to create a room from the reviewed quiz
Start the game from the host room
For each question, wait for the question to be displayed
For each question, submit any answer option before time expires
Continue after each leaderboard screen until the quiz completes
Choose to play again from the finished state
Start the game from the lobby state
Verify a question is displayed for the new game run

title: Reach game finished state and view final standings
description: Verifies that after progressing through all questions the game ends and the final standings are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation mode
Select a preset topic
Generate the quiz questions
Proceed to create a room from the reviewed quiz
Start the game from the host room
For each question, wait for the question to be displayed
For each question, submit any answer option before time expires
Continue after each leaderboard screen until the quiz completes
Verify the finished state is displayed with final standings

title: Create a room after questions are ready (host plays)
description: Verifies a host can enter required metadata, choose to play, create a room, and arrive at the host lobby showing a room code.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select Custom mode
Fill in the question text with "2+2?"
Fill four answer options with "3", "4", "5", and "6"
Mark "4" as the correct answer
Continue to the review step
Fill in the quiz title with "Math Quick Quiz"
Fill in the host name with "HostPlayer"
Choose the host role to play
Create the room
Verify the host lobby is displayed with a generated room code

title: Join via deep link with prefilled room code
description: Verifies a player can open a deep link with a prefilled room code, enter a name, and join to reach the player room screen.
category: Join by code or deep link

steps.description: Navigate to /join?code=ROOM01
Fill PLAYER01 into the player name field
Submit the join form
Verify the player lands on the player room screen

title: Host sees lobby presence update when a player joins
description: Verifies that when a player joins the room, the host lobby updates to show the new participant in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation option
Generate a quiz using a preset topic
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Copy the room code from the host lobby
Navigate to /join
Fill the copied room code into the room code field
Fill PLAYER_LOBBY_01 into the player name field
Submit the join form
Navigate to /create
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Verify the host lobby participant list reflects at least one joined player

title: Generate trivia set from preset topic and reach review
description: Verifies a host can generate a trivia question set using a preset topic and proceed to the review step.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Fill a quiz title into the quiz title field
Fill a host name into the host name field
Select Trivia mode
Select a preset topic
Select a question count
Submit the generate questions action
Verify a generated question set review is displayed

title: Generate trivia questions from a supported uploaded file
description: Verifies a host can upload a supported document, generate trivia questions from it, and reach the review screen with generated questions displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select Trivia mode
Switch the trivia source to File
Choose a supported local file from the file picker
Select a question count
Generate questions from the file
Verify the question review screen is displayed with generated questions

title: Player is auto-submitted with no answer on timeout
description: Verifies that if a player does not answer before time runs out, the UI transitions as if a no-answer submission occurred.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation option
Generate a quiz using a preset topic
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Copy the room code from the host lobby
Navigate to /join
Fill the copied room code into the room code field
Fill PLAYER_GAME_03 into the player name field
Submit the join form
Navigate to /create
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Start the game from the host lobby
Wait for the question timer to expire without selecting an answer
Verify the player transitions out of the active answering state after timeout

title: Generate trivia set from custom AI prompt and reach review
description: Verifies a host can enter a custom AI prompt, generate trivia questions, and reach the review step.
category: Trivia generation from custom AI prompt

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select Trivia mode
Switch the trivia source to AI prompt
Fill a custom topic prompt into the prompt field
Select a question count
Submit the generate questions action
Verify a generated question set review is displayed

title: Lobby share actions are available in host lobby
description: Verifies the host lobby exposes share affordances so the host can copy the room code and access a direct join link to share.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation option
Generate a quiz using a preset topic
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Verify the host lobby shows share options for room code and a direct join link

title: Prevent double submission from changing leaderboard flow
description: Verifies that rapidly attempting to submit an answer multiple times results in a single submission outcome and the leaderboard flow proceeds normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation mode
Select a preset topic
Generate the quiz questions
Proceed to create a room from the reviewed quiz
Start the game from the host room
Wait for the first question to be displayed
Select an answer option
Press Enter repeatedly to attempt to submit multiple times quickly
Verify the app transitions to a single leaderboard screen for the question

title: Prevent rapid Play Again clicks from breaking reset to lobby
description: Verifies that repeatedly activating the reset control results in a single reset outcome and the room returns to the lobby reliably.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation mode
Select a preset topic
Generate the quiz questions
Proceed to create a room from the reviewed quiz
Start the game from the host room
For each question, wait for the question to be displayed
For each question, submit any answer option before time expires
Continue after each leaderboard screen until the quiz completes
Press Enter repeatedly to activate the play again control multiple times quickly
Verify the host room returns to the lobby state

title: Start create flow from landing
description: Verifies a user can start the game creation journey from the landing page and reach quiz setup.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the create game entry point
Verify the user lands on the quiz setup page

title: Leaderboard displays without score delta (single participant)
description: Verifies that the leaderboard screen renders correctly even when there is only one participant and deltas may be minimal.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation mode
Select a preset topic
Generate the quiz questions
Proceed to create a room from the reviewed quiz
Start the game from the host room
Wait for the first question to be displayed
Wait for the question timer to expire without submitting an answer
Verify the leaderboard is displayed and shows at least one ranked entry

title: Host lobby shows participants list area
description: Verifies the host lobby displays a participants list area so the host can monitor who has joined.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation option
Generate a quiz using a preset topic
Proceed to create a room from the generated quiz
Verify the host lobby displays a participant list section

title: Start join flow from landing
description: Verifies a user can start the join journey from the landing page and reach the join form.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the join game entry point
Verify the user lands on the join page

title: Play Again action is only available after the game is finished
description: Verifies that the reset control is not available during lobby or in-progress gameplay and only appears in the finished state.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select the trivia preset topic generation mode
Select a preset topic
Generate the quiz questions
Proceed to create a room from the reviewed quiz
Verify the host lobby is displayed
Start the game from the host room
Wait for the first question to be displayed
Wait for the question timer to expire without submitting an answer
Continue after the leaderboard screen until the quiz completes
Verify the finished state displays an option to reset and play again

title: Generate a social pack and optionally prefill host answers
description: Verifies a host can generate a social pack, optionally prefill host answers, and reach the review screen with the pack questions ready.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select Social mode
Generate the social pack
Prefill host answers for the pack
Continue to the pack review step
Verify the social pack review screen is displayed with generated questions and host-answer inputs filled

title: Edit prefilled code before joining
description: Verifies a player can modify the prefilled deep-link room code, then join successfully and reach the player room screen.
category: Join by code or deep link

steps.description: Navigate to /join?code=ROOM01
Fill ROOM02 into the room code field
Fill PLAYER02 into the player name field
Submit the join form
Verify the player lands on the player room screen

title: Change preset topic and regenerate questions
description: Verifies a host can switch to a different preset topic and regenerate to get a new reviewable question set.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Fill a quiz title into the quiz title field
Fill a host name into the host name field
Select Trivia mode
Select a preset topic
Select a question count
Submit the generate questions action
Change the preset topic selection to a different topic
Submit the generate questions action again
Verify a generated question set review is displayed

title: Manually author a custom question set and review it
description: Verifies a host can create a custom question with four options, select a correct answer, and reach the review screen showing the authored set.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select Custom mode
Fill in the question text with "Capital of France?"
Fill four answer options with "Paris", "Rome", "Berlin", and "Madrid"
Mark "Paris" as the correct answer
Continue to the question set review step
Verify the custom question set review screen is displayed with the authored question listed

title: Generate trivia set after changing question count
description: Verifies a host can adjust the number of questions for a preset topic and still generate a reviewable question set.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Fill a quiz title into the quiz title field
Fill a host name into the host name field
Select Trivia mode
Select a preset topic
Select a question count
Change the question count selection to a different valid count
Submit the generate questions action
Verify a generated question set review is displayed

title: Block AI prompt generation when prompt is empty
description: Verifies the host cannot generate AI-prompt trivia without entering a prompt and sees inline validation feedback.
category: Trivia generation from custom AI prompt

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select Trivia mode
Switch the trivia source to AI prompt
Select a question count
Submit the generate questions action
Verify a prompt validation error is visible

title: Correct join after duplicate name error
description: Verifies a player can correct their name after a duplicate-name inline error and then join successfully to reach the player room screen.
category: Join by code or deep link

steps.description: Navigate to /join
Fill ROOM01 into the room code field
Fill TAKEN_NAME into the player name field
Submit the join form
Fill UNIQUE_NAME_01 into the player name field
Submit the join form
Verify the player lands on the player room screen

title: Prevent generation with missing required quiz metadata
description: Verifies the host cannot generate preset-topic questions until required fields are completed and sees inline validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select Trivia mode
Select a preset topic
Select a question count
Submit the generate questions action
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Generate AI prompt trivia after editing the prompt
description: Verifies a host can modify the custom AI prompt and still generate a reviewable question set.
category: Trivia generation from custom AI prompt

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select Trivia mode
Switch the trivia source to AI prompt
Fill a custom topic prompt into the prompt field
Fill updated text into the prompt field
Select a question count
Submit the generate questions action
Verify a generated question set review is displayed

title: Invalid room code shows inline error
description: Verifies submitting the join form with an invalid room code results in an inline invalid-room error and the player remains on the join screen.
category: Join by code or deep link

steps.description: Navigate to /join
Fill INVALID into the room code field
Fill PLAYER03 into the player name field
Submit the join form
Verify an inline invalid room code error is visible

title: Show inline error for unsupported file type before generation
description: Verifies selecting an unsupported file type shows an inline file type validation error and prevents file-based generation.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Select Trivia mode
Switch the trivia source to File
Choose an unsupported local file type from the file picker
Verify an inline file type validation error is visible
Verify file generation cannot be initiated

title: Duplicate player name shows inline error
description: Verifies joining with a player name already in use shows an inline duplicate-name error and allows the user to try again.
category: Join by code or deep link

steps.description: Navigate to /join
Fill ROOM01 into the room code field
Fill TAKEN_NAME into the player name field
Submit the join form
Verify an inline duplicate name error is visible

title: Room code is normalized to uppercase
description: Verifies entering a lowercase room code is normalized and the join attempt proceeds without client-side formatting issues.
category: Join by code or deep link

steps.description: Navigate to /join
Fill room01 into the room code field
Fill PLAYER06 into the player name field
Submit the join form
Verify the player lands on the player room screen
